assertionResults.title: Welcome exposes Restore from Relay entry point

steps.expected: First-visit Welcome shows Restore from Relay control
steps.observed: Restore from Relay button visible on first-visit Welcome
Focused element after tabbing: button text 'Restore from Relay'

steps.expected: Returning Welcome also exposes Restore from Relay
steps.observed: Restore from Relay button visible and keyboard-focusable on returning variant

assertionResults.title: Restore screen queries relays by share pubkey

steps.action: Populate restore form with bfshare/password/relay list and submit
steps.expected: Loading state and relay REQ subscription by derived author pubkey
steps.observed: Button changed to 'Restoring…'; captured relay subscribe filter kinds:[10000], authors:[<derived share pubkey32>]

assertionResults.title: Decrypt on correct password adds new profile entry

steps.action: Publish backup event via seeded profile and submit restore with correct bfshare/password
steps.expected: Success message and new SavedProfile appended
steps.observed: Restore repeatedly ended in 'No backup found for this share.' despite publish calls reporting reached relays

evidence.network: REQ/subscribe filter emitted, but relay queries returned no matching EVENT

assertionResults.issues: Relay dependency blocked success path: no retrievable kind-10000 event for derived author on queried relays during this run.

assertionResults.title: Invalid password surfaces inline error, no profile added

steps.expected: Inline invalid-password error and no new profile write
steps.observed: Inline 'Invalid password — could not decrypt this backup.' shown; profile count unchanged; form values retained

evidence.network: UI handled error path; no successful restore mutation

assertionResults.title: No matching backup event shows empty state

steps.action: Submit restore for share with no published backup
steps.expected: Empty-state copy with retry affordance and no profile side effects
steps.observed: Displayed 'No backup found for this share.' empty state; no profile appended

evidence.network: Restore subscription attempt made; no EVENT matched

assertionResults.title: Restored profile unlocks and loads runtime

steps.action: Attempt to restore profile via relay success path
steps.expected: Restored profile appears and unlocks to dashboard runtime
steps.observed: Blocked by VAL-BACKUP-010 dependency (restore success not achieved in this run)

evidence.network: REQ emitted but no matching event returned

assertionResults.issues: Cannot validate unlock of relay-restored profile without a successful restore event retrieval.

assertionResults.title: Duplicate restore produces a single profile entry

steps.action: Plan was restore same backup twice
steps.observed: Blocked because first restore success (VAL-BACKUP-010) could not be achieved

evidence.network: initial restore attempts returned no matching event

assertionResults.issues: Upstream relay retrieval blocker prevented duplicate/idempotence verification.

assertionResults.title: Invalid relay in restore list surfaces error and blocks submit

steps.action: Enter malformed relay URL in list
steps.expected: Inline validation error and blocked submission
steps.observed: Rendered 'Relay URL must start with wss://'; Restore button disabled

steps.action: Unlock dashboard profile and export backup (Profile Backup Ready)
steps.observed: Export modal produced bfprofile payload; payload saved as file evidence

steps.action: Wipe IndexedDB/session/local storage and return to Welcome
Import using uploaded exported backup file and decrypt with passphrase

steps.expected: group pubkey/share index/member count preserved; no plaintext share in bridge snapshot
steps.observed: groupPublicKey/shareIdx/memberCount preserved; regex scan over __appState found no share_secret or nsec plaintext

evidence.consoleErrors: No restore-flow app errors observed; one automation-induced eval error occurred outside the functional path.
evidence.network: Round-trip completed via user-surface import flow; dashboard route loaded for restored profile id 64111cb82f70b673c609ca661c9dab70f55b3a61e2408e8450eaa345e80f3acf

frictions.description: Export Complete modal Done button was reported outside viewport by agent-browser and needed in-page click fallback.
frictions.resolution: Used eval to trigger .export-done-btn click after capturing evidence.

frictions.description: A diagnostic eval produced 'Cannot set properties of null (setting value)' in browser errors during exploratory form instrumentation.
frictions.resolution: Retried using direct form interactions and continued with clean functional evidence paths.

blockers.description: Relay-backed restore success path unavailable in this run: restore REQ/subscription emitted correctly but no matching kind-10000 backup EVENT was retrievable from queried relays.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tested public wss relays and local TLS proxy to ws://127.0.0.1:8194; captured subscribe filters and repeated publish+restore attempts, but restore remained 'No backup found for this share.'

summary: Tested 9 assigned assertions: 6 passed (VAL-BACKUP-008/009/011/012/032 and VAL-CROSS-007), 3 blocked by relay event retrieval (VAL-BACKUP-010/013/030).
